creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-05 22:27:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Capture-Tiny Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Capture::Tiny provides a simple, portable way to capture anything sent to
  STDOUT or STDERR, regardless of whether it comes from Perl, from XS code or
  from an external program. Optionally, output can be teed so that it is captured
  while being passed through to the original handles.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Capture-Tiny/
  
  PR:             ports/135982
  Submitted by:   Bill Brinzer <bill.brinzer at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3545    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny/pkg-plist (new)
